    abhorsen awakens (#156)
    
    * chore: harden .gitignore; untrack all binary/media files from git index
    
    Phase 1 of repo size compliance (CrewAI 150 MiB limit — repo currently 438 MiB).
    
    Safe, nondestructive: files removed from git tracking only; nothing deleted
    from disk. Pack size on remote unchanged until Phase 2 (LFS migration,
    pending Logan approval).
    
    Changes:
    - .gitignore: add comprehensive binary/media exclusions — audio (m4a, mp3,
      mp4, wav, flac), images (jpg, jpeg, png, gif, webp, svg, heic), documents
      (pdf, docx, xlsx, pptx), geospatial (geojson, kml, kmz, shp, gpx),
      archives/binaries (zip, tar, gz, exe, bin, db, sqlite), and Obsidian
      plugin compiled assets (main.js, styles.css, manifest.json)
    - .gitattributes: created as stub with LFS rules commented out; ready to
      activate in Phase 2 when Logan approves git lfs migrate import + force push
    - git rm --cached: 134 binary/media files untracked (audio ×3, PDF ×49,
      images ×80, geospatial ×2, ZIP ×1); files remain on Logan's local machine
    
    Phase 2 (awaiting Logan): git lfs migrate import + force push to main
    reduces pack from ~354 MiB to ~30 MiB, clearing CrewAI gate.
